text:
The problem is that Hollywood has long ago lost it's ability to be subliminal. Before if a character was race swapped (I think Eartha Kitt as Catwoman is the earliest example I can think of) no one cared because she was still Catwoman. Her character didn't change, just her actress. And Hollywood has always tried to change people's minds to believe like them, but it wasn't so in your face (sometimes) so both sides could enjoy a story and come to their own conclusions. (Endless debates over movies has always been fun.) But now they want you to goose step beside them, and that's not how you make money. They are businesses first, so they need to go where the money is. And money is with well written stories, cool guys, hot chicks and minimal special effects. 

I hope we get a reprieve for at least 20 more years, then they can rebrand the Woke, and hopefully it will be rejected then too.
